analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: Supplementary Figure 16b source data is not present in the provided data files. MOESM10 (source data) contains only main Fig 1-5 sheets (Fig 1b, Fig 1f+g, Fig 3c, Fig 3f, Fig 5a, Fig 5b, Fig 5d, Fig 5e, Fig 5g, Fig 5h, Fig 5i, Fig 5j, Fig 5l). MOESM4-8 contain clinical data and supplementary tables but no Supplementary Figure 16b data for GLI2 expression / sonidegib treatment in S462TY cells. Per instructions, do not extract from figure images.
assumptions_made: Checked all xlsx sheets in data_dir (MOESM4, MOESM5, MOESM6, MOESM7, MOESM8, MOESM10); none contain Supplementary Figure 16b source data; GEO/IDAT/10x files present are for methylation and snRNA-seq analyses (Fig 2-4), not the S462TY sonidegib qPCR experiment.

C. VARIABLE CODING: Target = Supplementary Figure 16b GLI2 expression fold change under sonidegib treatment in S462TY cells. No sheet labeled for Supp Fig 16 exists in any provided xlsx. Source data file MOESM10 per paper documentation covers only main figures 1-5.

D. COMPUTATION: Not performed - data for Supplementary Figure 16b not available in the provided data_dir. Per task instructions: 'Check MOESM sheets. If absent, write DATA_UNAVAILABLE. Do NOT extract from figure images.'

E. RESULT: DATA_UNAVAILABLE - Supplementary Figure 16b source data is not included in any of the supplementary Excel files provided.

F. CAVEATS: The paper may not have released Supplementary Figure 16b as a source data sheet; supplementary figure source data was limited to Fig 1-5 (main figures) in MOESM10. Extracting fold-change values from the figure image is explicitly prohibited by task instructions.
